We further study the effectiveness of CI-MSE under evaluation distribution shifts and suggest design boundaries when using this metric. In summary, this paper provides a simple and reliable offline validation tool for accelerating policy iteration. Project webpage: https://ci-mse.github.io/

</details>


### [438] [Pondering the Way: Spatial-perceiving World Action Model for Embodied Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29908)
*Hong Chen,Daqi Liu,Zehan Zhang,Haiguang Wang,Tianhao Lu,Longfei Yan,Haiyang Sun,Fangzhen Li,Hongwei Xie,Bing Wang,Guang Chen,Hangjun Ye,Yihua Tan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SWAM是一种结合观察和动作生成的新型世界模型方法，用于视觉导航任务，能在只输入RGB图像的情况下高效、准确地生成连贯的路径与动作序列，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉导航的世界模型规划方法普遍存在目标意图和轨迹生成解耦、候选依赖性强、计算量大、采样动作与预测视觉结果不一致等问题，影响了导航效率和准确性。为了解决这些问题，作者希望设计一种任务驱动、能同时生成观察序列和动作序列的新方法。

Method: 提出SWAM框架，输入起点和终点的RGB观测后，单次推理可同时生成中间的RGB-D观测序列和对应的动作轨迹，强化目标一致性和空间可达性。训练时利用深度伪标签学习空间先验，推理阶段仅需单目RGB输入。还引入了视觉引导的动作精炼模块和轨迹级正则化损失，以细化运动和视觉线索的对齐，并提升推理稳定性。

Result: 大量实验表明，SWAM在成功率、轨迹精度和推理效率方面均大幅超越了两阶段方案的SOTA基线，并在零样本泛化到新环境时表现出很强的鲁棒性。

Conclusion: SWAM框架有效提升了视觉导航任务中的路径规划质量和推理效率，能更好地适应新环境，为世界模型方法在视觉导航中的应用提供了有价值的进展。

Abstract: Existing world model-based planners for visual navigation typically follow a verification-centric paradigm, decoupling goal intent from trajectory synthesis. This approach suffers from candidate dependence, heavy computational overhead, and inconsistencies between sampled actions and predicted visuals. To address these issues, we propose SWAM (Spatial-perceiving World Action Model), a task-centric joint observation-action generation framework. Given start and goal RGB observations, SWAM performs single-pass inference to simultaneously generate intermediate RGB-D sequences and corresponding action trajectories, promoting goal-consistent trajectory generation and improved spatial feasibility. While SWAM leverages depth pseudo-labels during training to internalize spatial priors, it requires only monocular RGB input at inference time. We further introduce a visual-guided action refinement module and a trajectory-scale regularization loss to enforce fine-grained alignment between motion and visual cues while stabilizing predictions across varying distances. Extensive experiments show that SWAM significantly outperforms state-of-the-art two-stage planners in success rate, trajectory accuracy, and inference efficiency, while demonstrating robust zero-shot generalization to unseen environments.

</details>


### [439] [Sphere-VIO: Fast and Robust Visual-Inertial Odometry via Unified Spherical Representation for Heterogeneous Multi-Camera Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29910)
*Yueteng Yang,Yusen Xie,Hao Wei,Qianhao Wang,Boyu Zhou,Fei Gao,Jun Ma,Jinni Zhou*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种面向异构多摄像头系统的轻量级视觉-惯性里程计（VIO）框架Sphere-VIO，基于统一球面表征实现鲁棒、实时、高效的多摄像头位姿估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有多摄像头VIO方案大多为固定相机设置专门设计，缺乏统一兼容不同相机模型的能力；同时，缺少统一跨相机的特征管理和关联机制，导致鲁棒性、深度估计和实时性难以兼顾。

Method: 1. 提出统一球面全景模型（USPM），支持标准任意相机模型，建立共享球面空间快速映射，实现高效特征管理和三角化。2. 设计分层全向特征对准（HOFA）流程，实现全局球面约束下的鲁棒跨相机特征匹配，并通过深度观测融合稳定初始化。3. 开发支持多相机的ESKF后端，利用球面量测残差和Schur边缘化优化，降低计算量。

Result: 在公开数据集和自建全向数据集上的大量实验表明，Sphere-VIO在准确性、鲁棒性、效率及跨相机通用性之间实现了优越的平衡。

Conclusion: Sphere-VIO框架有效扩展了VIO方法对异构多相机环境的适应能力，在资源受限设备上也能高效准确运行，推动了多摄像头VIO系统的发展。

Abstract: Multi-camera visual-inertial odometry (VIO) overcomes the inherent limitations of pure visual systems by expanding the field of view. However, existing algorithms are typically tailored for fixed camera setups and lack unified compatibility with heterogeneous multi-camera systems. Meanwhile, due to the absence of a unified cross-camera representation and association mechanism, current methods struggle to achieve a balance among robust cross-camera feature tracking, stable depth estimation, and reliable real-time performance. To address these issues, we present Sphere-VIO, a lightweight filter-based VIO framework with unified spherical representation for heterogeneous multi-camera systems. Specifically, we first propose a Unified Spherical Panorama Model (USPM) that supports all standard camera models and enables bidirectional fast mapping between multi-camera images and a shared spherical space without sequential stitching, simplifying cross-camera feature management and improving triangulation efficiency. Second, we design a parallel-accelerated depth-guided semi-direct tracking pipeline, namely Hierarchical Omnidirectional Feature Alignment (HOFA), with global spherical constraints for robust cross-camera matching, and fuse multi-camera depth observations into a standard depth filter for stable initialization. Finally, we develop a multi-camera-adapted ESKF backend that employs spherical bearing residuals and Schur complement marginalization to minimize computational overhead, enabling accurate real-time state estimation on resource-constrained devices. Extensive experiments on public benchmarks and a custom omnidirectional dataset show that Sphere-VIO achieves superior trade-offs between accuracy, robustness, efficiency, and cross-camera generality.

</details>


### [440] [Flying to Image-Specified Objects: 3D Quadrotor Navigation via Cross-Graph Memory and Viewpoint Planning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29917)
*Junjie Gao,Yuqi Chen,Yongzhou Pan,Yaosheng Deng,Jiaping Xiao,Mir Feroskhan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于四旋翼无人机的实例图像目标导航的分层方法，有效提升了机器人根据参考图片寻找特定目标实例的能力，并在仿真和现实飞行实验中验证了其实用性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有实例图像导航主要针对地面机器人，难以适用于受限视野、三维连续控制和安全要求更高的四旋翼飞行器。因此亟需适合飞行机器人、更高效且安全的导航方法。

Method: 方法采用分层架构，将高层决策与低层运动执行解耦，不直接导航到空间坐标，而是围绕前沿区域和潜在目标对象生成关注视点的行动点。系统维护轻量级语义记忆，将语义信息用于行动决策，基于学习的策略选择最佳行动点，再由轨迹规划模块生成安全可行的三维飞行路径。

Result: 在模拟实验中，该方法在多个指标上稳定优于强基线方法，并通过实际四旋翼飞行证明了系统的理论可用性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 提出的分层导航框架显著提升了四旋翼在实例图像目标导航任务中的表现，能在保障安全和信息有效性的同时，灵活探索和识别目标，适应性和实用性兼备，适合实际应用。

Abstract: Instance-Specific Image-Goal Navigation (InstanceImageNav) requires a robot to navigate toward the exact object instance depicted in a query image. Extending this task to quadrotors is challenging due to continuous 3D control, limited field of view (FOV), and safety constraints, which make successful navigation highly dependent on selecting informative viewpoints. We propose a hierarchical navigation framework for quadrotor InstanceImageNav that separates high-level decision making from low-level motion execution. Instead of navigating directly to spatial locations, the system generates viewpoint-aware action nodes around frontier regions and potential target objects, enabling the robot to explore while maintaining informative viewpoints for detecting the target instance. A lightweight semantic memory maintains object-level and observation-level context, allowing semantic cues to propagate to candidate action nodes for decision making. A learning-based policy selects the most promising action node, and a trajectory planner generates dynamically feasible 3D flight paths for safe execution. Experiments in simulation demonstrate consistent improvements over strong baselines, and real-world quadrotor flights validate the practicality and robustness of the proposed framework.

</details>


### [441] [RoamFlow: Reinforcement-Aligned One-Step Action MeanFlow Policy for Image-Goal Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29934)
*Zixuan Zhang,Yuqi Chen,Junjie Gao,Siyuan Song,Yongzhou Pan,Beichen Wang,Mir Feroskhan*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了RoamFlow，一种利用MeanFlow生成平均速度场以高效生成导航轨迹的新方法，并结合模仿学习与强化学习实现高效和准确的图像目标导航，在仿真和真实环境下表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于强化学习的图像目标导航方法难以处理长时依赖，导致轨迹不理想，推理速度较慢，不能很好地应用在实时场景。

Method: 设计了RoamFlow框架，利用MeanFlow生成平均速度场，实现轨迹的快速生成，采用专家模仿获得稳定初始策略，再用强化学习进行策略微调，提升任务适应性。

Result: 在Habitat仿真平台和现实机器人上测试，RoamFlow能够在保证导航性能的同时，实现推理效率的大幅提升，满足实时应用需求。

Conclusion: RoamFlow有效缓解了现有方法对长时依赖建模不足和推理效率低下的问题，在图像目标导航任务中表现出良好的通用性和实用性。

Abstract: Image-goal navigation is a key challenge in embodied robotics, where an agent must reach a target specified solely by a goal image. While existing reinforcement learning approaches map perceptual observations directly to actions, they struggle to model long-horizon dependencies, often leading to suboptimal trajectories. To address this limitation, we propose RoamFlow, a generative navigation framework that leverages MeanFlow to predict the average velocity field for trajectory synthesis, enabling efficient few-step generation and reducing inference latency. We further adopt a two-stage training strategy that combines expert imitation for stable initialization with reinforcement learning for task-specific policy refinement. Extensive experiments in both Habitat simulation and real-world robotic platforms demonstrate that RoamFlow achieves efficient inference while maintaining strong navigation performance under real-time constraints.

</details>


### [442] [OpenSPM: An Environment-Transferable Robotic Key Spatial Pose Memory and Closed-Loop High-Frequency Flow-Matching Action Generation Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29936)
*Iok Tong Lei,Qingchen Xie,Yifan Wang,Yap Ying Jie,Zhidong Deng*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了OpenSPM框架，通过空间持久记忆和流匹配动作生成，实现高效且低耗能的开放环境桌面机器人操作。该方法在LIBERO-GOAL任务集上表现优异，成功率高，控制频率快。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有端到端视觉-语言-动作模型虽然在语义泛化方面优越，但缺乏对精细物体几何位姿的显式约束，且训练成本高，不利于实际高频物理任务执行。亟需在高层语义与底层物理执行之间建立桥梁。

Method: OpenSPM包括：1）结合语义条件的3D感知与卡尔曼滤波持续跟踪6D位姿；2）从人类演示中提取关键空间位姿，作为对象中心的空间持久记忆；3）推理时，根据自然语言检索相关记忆条目，利用SE(3)变换适配新场景，并通过轻量级条件流匹配模型生成高频动作；4）实时结合本体反馈和终端残差修正以降低轨迹误差。

Result: 在十个LIBERO-GOAL任务上，OpenSPM取得了85.6%的高成功率，等效控制频率达到1033.3Hz，且推理阶段对AI算力需求极低。消融实验表明空间持久记忆和闭环残差校正对任务成功率提升至关重要。

Conclusion: OpenSPM有效弥合了语义理解与精细物理执行之间的差距，实现了高效、稳定、低资源消耗的开放环境机器人操作，对提升实际场景下的机器人智能具重要意义。

Abstract: Open-environment tabletop robotic manipulation requires systems to possess semantic understanding, precise geometric pose estimation, and high-frequency action generation. While end-to-end vision-language-action (VLA) models excel at semantic generalization, they often lack explicit geometric constraints for fine-grained tasks and require costly training. To bridge the gap between high-level semantics and low-level physical execution, we propose OpenSPM, an open environment spatial persistent memory framework consisting of spatial pose memory and flow-matching action generation model. OpenSPM first leverages semantically conditioned 3D perception and Kalman filtering to track continuous 6D poses. It then extracts key spatial poses from human demonstrations, keeping them as transferable, object-centric spatial persistent memory entries. During inference, OpenSPM retrieves relevant memory entries in terms of natural language instructions, transfers the spatial poses to new scenes using SE(3) transformations, and generates high-frequency action chunks via a lightweight conditional flow-matching model. Combined with real-time proprioceptive state feedback and terminal residual correction, the system effectively suppresses trajectory error accumulation. Evaluated on ten LIBERO-GOAL tasks, OpenSPM achieves an 85.6% success rate and an equivalent control frequency of 1033.3 Hz, while requiring minimal inference AI computing power. Extensive ablations illustrate that structured spatial persistent memory and closed-loop residual correction play a crucial role in reliable, high-frequency robotic manipulation.

</details>


### [443] [REPAIR-Bench: A Benchmark for Robot Error Perception And Interaction Recovery](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29937)
*Giuliano Pioldi,Yashika Batra,Arman Ibrayeva,Yuanchen Bai,Purnjay Maruur,Promise Ekpo,Angelique Taylor*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了REPAIR-Bench基准，用于系统性评估和研究人机交互中的机器人失败及其恢复策略。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究往往将机器人失败视为独立事件，并且只关注二元检测和基于规则的恢复，缺乏对连续交互和用户适应性的研究，因此需要更全面的数据集和评价标准来推动机器人的可靠性和信任度提升。

Method: 作者建立了REPAIR-Bench基准，收集了41名参与者共214次交互试验，涵盖四种诱发的失败类型，并同步获取面部动作单元、头部姿态、语音转录及用户感受与恢复倾向报告。基准设计了三个新颖的评价任务：1）跨多次交互的失败检测；2）多类别的失败类型视觉分类；3）基于用户偏好的恢复方案预测。实验使用分层递归模型和微调大模型等方法，进行了基线实验。

Result: 分层递归模型在失败检测上显著优于单次模型（严格F1 0.80对0.68），失败定位误差分别为-0.51秒和2.97秒。恢复策略预测中，微调的大模型（QLoRA-tuned Mistral-7B）达到了Hit@5=0.76和F1@5=0.32。

Conclusion: REPAIR-Bench为人机交互特别是医疗场景下的机器人失败评估与恢复系统开发提供了标准化框架，有助于构建更透明、自适应、值得信赖的机器人系统。

Abstract: Understanding how users perceive and respond to robot failures is essential for building robust and trustworthy robot systems. Prior work, however, (i) often treats failures as independent events, (ii) emphasizes binary failure detection, (iii) with rule-based recovery modeling. We present REPAIR-Bench, built on 214 interaction trials from 41 participants, the benchmark spans four induced failure types and provides synchronized facial action units, head pose, speech transcripts, and post-interaction affect and recovery reports. The benchmark spans three novel evaluation tasks that jointly capture the lifecycle of failure in human-robot interaction (HRI): (i) failure detection over inter-dependent interaction sessions, modeling longitudinal user adaptation across repeated failures; (ii) visual failure-type classification beyond binary success/failure formulations; and (iii) user-centered recovery prediction, inferring users' preferred recovery strategies from interaction context rather than relying on manually designed or rule-based strategies. In baseline experiments, hierarchical recurrent modeling improved failure detection over a single-session model (strict F1: 0.80 vs. 0.68), achieved a failure localization mean signed error of -0.51 s, median absolute error of 2.97 s and, for recovery prediction, a QLoRA-tuned Mistral-7B reached Hit@5=0.76 and F1@5=0.32. REPAIR-Bench provides both the HRI and Medical HRI communities with a standardized framework for (1) evaluating robot failures and (2) building transparent, adaptive, and trustworthy recovery systems.

</details>


### [444] [WARP: Whole-Body Retargeting for Learning from Offline Human Demonstrations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29940)
*Zhenyang Chen,Chuizheng Kong,Chuye Zhang,Yuanshao Yang,Lawrence Y. Zhu,Shreyas Kousik,Danfei Xu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: WARP提出了一种将人类演示数据精确转化为机器人全身动作的离线方法，实现了无需遥操作的数据采集，可直接进行零样本全身移动操作任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有从人类演示到机器人动作的迁移方法精度有限，且在处理全身大范围运动时存在多解或不一致问题，制约了机器人学习移动操作技能的可扩展性。

Method: 提出WARP离线管道，利用基于关节坐标（肩-肘-腕）的封闭式几何求解器，实现端执行器的精确跟踪和全身结构意图保留，结合懒惰移动底盘控制提取一致、准确的机器人动作轨迹。

Result: 实验证明，WARP生成的机器人轨迹数据在真实环境下高可靠性复现，且是首个可直接利用离线人类演示实现零样本全身移动操作的系统。

Conclusion: WARP显著提升了人到机器人全身动作迁移的精度和一致性，消除了对遥操作数据采集的依赖，有助于规模化采集并赋予机器人复杂的移动操作能力。

Abstract: Direct transfer from human demonstration to learnable robot action is a crucial step towards scalable whole-body mobile manipulation. While human data scales better than mobile teleoperation, it requires overcoming significant embodiment gaps. Existing retargeting methods yield imprecise or inconsistent solutions, causing action multi-modality that prevents supervised policies from reliably converging. We present Whole-body-Aware Retargeting from human Pose (WARP), an offline pipeline that explicitly models embodiment differences to extract precise, unique whole-body actions. WARP leverages a closed-form Shoulder-Elbow-Wrist (SEW) geometric solver for exact end-effector tracking while preserving whole-body structural intent. Paired with lazy mobile-base control, it extracts accurate, consistent robot trajectories. Evaluations show WARP provides highly reliable data for open-loop real-world replay. To our knowledge, WARP is the first framework to achieve zero-shot whole-body mobile manipulation directly from offline human demonstrations, eliminating the need for human-in-the-loop teleoperation action data. More details on https://warp-retarget.github.io/

</details>


### [445] [Seeing Touch from Motion: A Unified Modality-Aware Visuo-Tactile Policy with Tactile Motion Correlation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29941)
*Shengqi Xu,Guojin Zhong,Yang Liu,Fanjie Wang,Hu Luo,Hanyu Zhou,Weiyao Zhang,Ziyi Ye,Zuxuan Wu,Yu-Gang Jiang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结合视觉和触觉的新型感知与策略方法，提高了机器人在接触丰富操作任务中的精细感知与决策能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前高分辨率光学触觉传感器虽然能间接获知触觉信息，但对精细接触状态的区分仍存在感知模糊问题，影响机器人复杂操作场景下的表现。现有方法单纯依赖图像或累积位移场，难以区分细微接触差异。

Method: 作者发现瞬时与累积运动之间的相关性可以有效区分精细的接触状态，进而提出了运动感知触觉表示方法。此外，提出一种基于Mixture-of-Transformers架构的统一模态感知策略，实现了视觉与触觉信息的高效融合与互补。

Result: 新方法能够更准确地区分和理解复杂、细微的接触状态，同时兼顾模态特异性和跨模态互补性，大大提升了机器人感知及操作表现。

Conclusion: 运动感知触觉表示和统一融合策略显著解决了触觉感知模糊和多模态特征提取的难题，为高精度机器人接触操作任务提供了更有力的技术支持。

Abstract: Visuo-Tactile policies leveraging optical tactile sensors have shown great promise in contact-rich manipulation. These sensors achieve high spatial resolution and multi-dimensional force sensing by utilizing an internal camera to monitor the deformation of their elastic gel surface, thereby indirectly inferring tactile cues. Despite their advantages, extracting fine-grained contact states necessary for contact-rich manipulation remains an open challenge. Existing methods typically use either raw images or cumulative motion fields to represent tactile cues. However, both are prone to perception ambiguity. Raw tactile images mainly capture appearance changes, while cumulative motion fields only reflect the aggregate gel deformation. Consequently, distinct fine-grained contact states can exhibit highly similar patterns, making it difficult to explicitly distinguish subtle contact variations. To address this issue, we explore the dynamic priors of tactile motion and discover that the correlation between transient and cumulative motion can explicitly distinguish fine-grained contact states. Based on this insight, we propose a motion-aware tactile representation to facilitate contact-rich manipulation. Beyond tactile representation, effective fusion of tactile and visual modalities is also critical. Most existing fusion methods either directly concatenate features from each modality or train modality-specific networks separately and fuse their outputs. However, these strategies struggle to simultaneously model cross-modal interactions and preserve modality-specific characteristics. In this work, we take advantage of the Mixture-of-Transformers architecture and propose a unified modality-aware visuo-tactile policy that captures cross-modal complementarity while maintaining modality-specific properties.

</details>


### [446] [Heterogeneous Tactile Transformer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.29948)
*Jianxin Bi,Qiang Wang,Jayaram Reddy,Kelvin Lin,Soibkhon Khajikhanov,Ruihan Gao,Harold Soh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新的异构触觉传感器通用模型HTT，能够在多种类型的触觉传感器之间迁移和共享学习策略，显著提升了触觉数据的泛化和扩展能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前触觉传感器天生异构，不同类型的传感器间无法直接迁移学习成果，制约了触觉数据在复杂操作任务中的大规模利用。

Method: 提出异构触觉Transformer（HTT）框架，包括针对每种传感器的独立编码器和一个共享的Transformer主干。模型通过不同模态的掩码重构及传感器配对对齐预训练，并利用自制的HPT大规模配对数据集（含160万帧跨四种传感器的同步数据）训练。

Result: HTT在多种触觉感知与实际操作任务中，表现出可迁移的共享表征能力，能够适应新任务，并对未见过的传感器具备良好泛化能力。

Conclusion: HTT极大弥合了异构触觉传感器间的数据鸿沟，为触觉数据的规模化利用和复杂操作策略学习提供了有力工具。

Abstract: Tactile sensors are inherently heterogeneous: a model trained on one sensor cannot be directly used on another, which limits learning contact-rich manipulation policies from diverse tactile data at scale. To bridge this gap, we propose the Heterogeneous Tactile Transformer (HTT), a framework that learns shared tactile representations across heterogeneous sensors. HTT consists of sensor-specific encoders and a shared transformer trunk, and is pretrained with per-modality masked reconstruction together with cross-modal alignment between paired sensors. Pretraining uses our novel Heterogeneous Paired Tactile (HPT) dataset, containing 1.6M synchronized paired frames across four vision- and array-based tactile sensors. Across distinct tactile perception and real-world manipulation tasks, HTT is shown to learn transferable representations that adapt to new tasks and previously unseen sensors. Dataset, code, and model checkpoints will be released upon publication at https://jxbi1010.github.io/htt-gh-page/.

</details>


### [447] [SIR: Structured Image Representations for Explainable Robot Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30101)
*Paul Mattes,Jan Schwab,Jens Bosch,Nils Blank,Maximilian Xiling Li,Minh-Trung Tang,Moritz Haberland,Rudolf Lioutikov*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种结构化图像表示（SIR），利用场景图作为中间表示形式，提高机器人策略学习的可解释性和抗干扰性，并在RoboCasa环境中取得了优于传统图像方法的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于学习视觉嵌入的机器人策略缺乏显式结构且对视觉干扰敏感，导致机器人行为难以解释和信任。因此，需要一种更具透明性、结构化的视觉表征方法提升理解与可靠性。

Method: 方法首先构建一个全连接图，将图像特征作为节点初始表示。随后使用一个端到端模块对该图稀疏化，筛选出与任务相关的子图，最终将该子图输入动作生成模型。整个过程支持对模型决策的可解释性分析。

Result: 在RoboCasa环境中，稀疏图策略相比基于图像的基线方法表现更优，平均成功率分别为19.5%和14.81%。此外，通过分析模型生成的子图，可以揭示数据集中的偏差和假相关等潜在问题。

Conclusion: SIR方法能够提升策略表现并增强模型的可解释性，对机器人视觉感知与决策提供了一种结构化、透明的解决思路，有助于发现和修正数据集偏差。

Abstract: Existing robot policies based on learned visual embeddings lack explicit structure and are sensitive to visual distractions. Thus, the representations that drive their behaviour are often opaque, making their decision-making process difficult to interpret. To address this, we introduce Structured Image Representations (SIR), a method that leverages Scene Graphs (SGs) as an intermediate representation for robot policy learning. Our approach first constructs a fully connected graph, using image-derived features as initial node representations. Then, a module learns to sparsify this graph end-to-end, creating a task-relevant sub-graph that is passed to the action generation model. This process makes our model intrinsically explainable. Evaluations on RoboCasa show that our sparse graph policies outperform image-based baselines on average with 19.5% vs 14.81% success rate. Most importantly, we show that the learned sparse graphs are a powerful tool for model analysis. By analysing when the model's sub-graph deviates from human expectation, such as by including distractor nodes or omitting key objects, we successfully uncover dataset biases, including spurious correlations and positional biases. https://github.com/intuitive-robots/SIR_Model

</details>


### [448] [TacEvo: Self-Evolving Architecture Discovery for Robotic Tactile Perception via LLM-Driven Quality-Diversity Search](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30109)
*Mohammed AbuSadeh,Lan Wei,Dandan Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 提出了一种通过大模型自动演化神经网络结构的视觉触觉感知新框架TacEvo，可用于机器人触觉传感，实现架构多样性和效率的协同优化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉触觉传感神经网络往往依赖专家手工设计和调优，效率低下，架构创新有限；而现有NAS方法依赖手动设定的搜索空间、计算成本高，限制了结构创新与适应性。

Method: 提出TacEvo框架，利用大语言模型（LLM）生成神经网络架构变异与交叉代码，通过MAP-Elites保留多样性精英架构并优先使用表现优异的生成方式，同时采用结构多样性和效率比两个行为描述符引导搜索，兼顾创新与算力效率。

Result: 在ViTacTip数据集上，TacEvo自动生成架构的可靠性高（分别为96.0%和94.5%可训练），20代演化中最佳验证性能提升56.1%和96.1%。高保真评测显示，在力回归匹配专家基线，在精细分辨分级分类上优于专家。

Conclusion: 基于大模型的自进化架构搜索为专用机器人感知任务提供了高效且富有创新力的AI赋能新范式。

Abstract: Vision-based tactile sensing converts contact-induced surface deformation into images, enabling robots to infer contact forces and fine surface textures that are not accessible through conventional vision alone. However, tactile images are sensor- and physics-specific, so effective architectures often require expert intuition and extensive manual iteration. Existing neural architecture search (NAS) pipelines can reduce this burden, but they are often computationally expensive and restricted to hand-designed search spaces, which limits architectural novelty and diversity. We introduce TacEvo, a self-evolving architecture discovery framework that improves network designs from downstream feedback. TacEvo uses an LLM to generate code-level mutations and crossovers, and a MAP-Elites quality-diversity loop that preserves diverse elite architectures while preferentially reusing prompts that consistently yield improvements. Exploration is guided by two behavioural descriptors, Architectural Diversity and Efficiency Ratio, which encourage coverage across structural variations and compute-size trade-offs. On ViTacTip force regression and grating classification, TacEvo achieves high autonomous generation reliability (96.0%/94.5% trainable) and improves best validation fitness over 20 generations by 56.1%/96.1%. In a 20-seed post-search high-fidelity evaluation, TacEvo matches the expert baseline on force prediction and outperforms it on fine-grained grating classification. These results suggest that LLM-driven self-evolving search constitutes a practical paradigm for AI-assisted scientific discovery in specialised robotic sensing.

</details>


### [449] [Automating the Design of Embodied AgentArchitectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30111)
*Jian Zhou,Sihao Lin,Jin Li,Shuai Fu,Gengze Zhou,Qi Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出并评估了一种自动化设计具身智能体（embodied agent）架构的方法，通过系统搜索，提升其在多种感知任务上的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前具身智能体的结构高度依赖人工设计，涉及知觉、记忆、规划等模块，具体实现极度依赖于研究者的直觉和经验。虽然文本领域的Agent Architecture Search（AAS）可以自动搜索智能体架构，但该方法在感知型智能体（需要处理实际感知输入）上的效果未被系统性评估。

Method: 作者提出AgentCanvas作为智能体架构的可视化编辑和运行平台，并设计了KDLoop作为智能体架构搜索流程。该流程循环进行方案生成、批评、实验和归纳，并在探索陷入停滞时触发反思。作者在4类典型具身智能体任务（如视觉-语言导航、具身问答、条件操控等）上评估3种AAS变体，形成3x4的结果矩阵。

Result: 自动化架构搜索能够带来具身智能体任务的成功率提升，并筛除高分但存在‘信息泄漏’的架构候选。但是，实验也揭示出感知型智能体架构搜索中的瓶颈：优化信号容易被仿真噪声掩盖、搜索陷入局部最优，以及即使记录详尽，回合级信用分配也不完全理想。

Conclusion: 本文表明，自动化架构搜索在提升具身智能体性能方面颇具潜力，但也受到仿真噪声、信用分配、搜索局限等多重约束，需进一步改进以充分释放其潜能。

Abstract: Embodied agents are typically built as hand-designed compositions of perception, memory, planning, and action modules. This modularity exposes a large architectural design space, but current systems still rely on researcher intuition to choose where information is stored, how observations are processed, and how model calls are connected. Agent Architecture Search (AAS) automates such design for text-domain agents, but has not been systematically evaluated on perceptual embodied agents through simulator rollouts. We study this transfer. We introduce AgentCanvas, a typed-graph runtime that hosts embodied executors as editable node-and-wire programs with simulator-aware execution and episode-level logs, and KDLoop, a coding-agent search procedure that cycles through proposal, critique, experiment, and distillation, with triggered reflection after stalls. We evaluate three AAS variants across four embodied executors spanning vision-language navigation, embodied question answering, and language-conditioned manipulation. The resulting 3x4 matrix shows that architecture-level search can produce deployable and directional success-rate gains on embodied tasks, while one apparent high-scoring candidate is rejected as leak-bearing. At the same time, the experiments expose constraints that are muted in text-domain AAS: optimization signals can be masked by rollout noise, search can become trapped in local edit basins, and episode-level credit assignment only partially emerges even when detailed logs are available. These results characterize both the promise and the current limits of automated architecture search for embodied agents.

</details>


### [450] [SA-VLA: State-aware tokenizer for improving Vision-Language-Action Models' performance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30113)
*Tengyue Jiang,Chunpu Xu,Jiayue Kang,Yao Mu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出一种能根据状态解码离散动作的机制（SA-VLA），有效提升机器人操控任务中离散动作建模的准确率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有离散动作离散化方法忽略了机器人自身传感（本体）状态，导致相同离散动作码在不同状态下表现不一致，尤其在多变的操控任务中，极大影响实际控制效果，需提升状态感知以优化动作还原。

Method: 提出SA-VLA，一种状态感知动作离散化器，在动作解码时结合机器人当前状态。具体研究两种VQ基础的状态注入机制：一是用状态与动作特征做交叉注意力；二是使用轻量级状态适配器，预测动作相关的调制因子，对动作实现状态调制和解码。该方法能让有限的离散码本更好地覆盖状态依赖的连续动作空间。

Result: 在12个RoboTwin操控任务上，SA-VLA方案令平均成功率从0.29提升到0.56；在3个真实任务的零样本仿真到现实实验中，平均成功率由0.15提升到0.33，均优于当前最强对比基线。

Conclusion: 根据状态进行动作解码能显著缩小离散动作策略的压缩损失，是一种简单且高效的改进方式。

Abstract: Discrete action tokenization provides a compact interface for autoregressive VLA policies, but accurately recovering continuous robot actions from discrete codes remains challenging. Existing tokenizers typically map each discrete code to a fixed continuous action prototype, ignoring the robot's current proprioceptive state. This limitation is particularly pronounced in manipulation, where the same action token may require different continuous controls under different joint configurations, object poses, and contact conditions. We therefore propose SA-VLA, a state-aware action tokenizer that conditions action decoding on robot state. We study two state-injection mechanisms for VQ-based action tokenization: cross-attention between state and action features, and a lightweight state adapter that predicts action-wise modulation factors for state-conditioned action modulation and reconstruction. The adapter formulation expands the effective support of a finite codebook by allowing each discrete token to represent a family of state-dependent continuous actions, while preserving the efficiency and compatibility of discrete action modeling. Integrated into an LLM-based VLA policy, SA-VLA supports both autoregressive and parallel action-token decoding with minimal changes to the model interface. On 12 RoboTwin manipulation tasks, SA-VLA improves the average success rate from 0.29 to 0.56 over the strongest tokenizer baseline. In zero-shot sim-to-real experiments on three real-world tasks, it further improves average success from 0.15 to 0.33 over the strongest tokenizer baseline. These results demonstrate that state-conditioned action decoding is a simple and effective mechanism for reducing the compression gap in discrete VLA policies.

</details>


### [451] [AERIS: Aerial-Edge Role-Driven Intelligence at Runtime via Orchestrated Language-Model Swarm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30151)
*Jiabin Lou,Haopeng Wang,Xinyu Liu,Yu Zhang,Rongye Shi,Wenjun Wu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了AERIS边缘部署框架，通过动态调度小型语言模型及感知控制模块，实现了大型语言模型在无人机平台上的高效部署，提升了自主智能水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前将大型语言模型集成到机器人系统中有望增强其智能化和自主性，但受限于调度约束和算力限制，实际应用部署存在困难。

Method: AERIS将小型语言模型与轻量级感知与控制模块按角色组织，能够在运行时动态实例化并根据资源变化跨算力执行单元切换；引入注意力-子目标对齐机制分解长时指令，并通过指令标注逐步实现长期目标。

Result: 在高保真无人机视觉-语言导航基准上，AERIS在心跳时序机制下保持了低频规划器与高频控制器间稳定闭环运行，支持实时闭环操作；在两项现实无人机实验中验证了其可部署性。

Conclusion: AERIS能有效推动大型语言模型智能向边缘无人机平台迁移，兼顾实时性、协同性及部署灵活性，为实际部署带来了新可能。

Abstract: Integrating large language models into robotic systems holds promise for enhancing autonomy, yet practical deployment remains constrained by strict heartbeat-constrained scheduling and limited computational power. We propose AERIS: an edge deployment framework for aerial platforms. It organizes dedicated small language models combined with lightweight perception and control modules into roles that can be instantiated at runtime, and dynamically rebinds them across different executors as resources change, thereby pushing intelligent capabilities to the edge. AERIS achieves long-horizon instruction decomposition through an attention-subgoal alignment mechanism, which involves annotating the currently active instruction step in messages, thereby progressively approaching long-term objectives. We evaluate AERIS on a high-fidelity UAV Vision-and-Language Navigation benchmark. Under a heartbeat-timed execution mechanism, AERIS maintains a stable perception-decision-control loop between a low-frequency planner and a high-frequency controller, supporting real-time closed-loop operation. We further validate its deployability through two real-world experiments focused on planning and fast response. A demonstration video is provided in the supplementary materials.

</details>


### [452] [Self-supervised Geometry Reasoning for LiDAR Simultaneous Localization and Mapping](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30166)
*Jiwoo Kim,Jinwoo Lee,Woojae Shin,Giseop Kim,Hyondong Oh*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种自监督的局部几何表示学习框架，通过将局部几何信息反馈至LiDAR SLAM系统，提升了低分辨率或稀疏点云条件下的定位与建图精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有LiDAR SLAM流程多采用人为设计的局部几何量作为输入，但在点云稀疏或传感器分辨率低时，这些估计易受噪声影响，导致定位和建图的不稳定。因此，亟需一种能够自动学习、鲁棒的几何表示。

Method: 每个点采用高斯分布建模，以协方差来描述局部几何，无需几何标签或真实位姿，通过最大化几何似然及自监督一致性损失训练。学到的几何表示参与SLAM主循环，递归改善定位及监督信号。该方法无需改动SLAM主框架，可直接集成。

Result: 在KITTI数据集不同分辨率下的实验显示，该自监督几何学习法提高了LiDAR里程计（odometry）和全局点云配准（global registration）性能。

Conclusion: 新提出的自监督几何学习模块能够稳健提升LiDAR SLAM在各种点云分辨率条件下的整体表现，并且可无缝嵌入现有系统中。

Abstract: LiDAR simultaneous localization and mapping (SLAM) relies on local geometric quantities such as covariances, correspondences, and surface structures. However, most existing pipelines rely on hand-crafted estimates of local geometry and use them as fixed inputs to LiDAR SLAM, which can make the estimated local geometry noisy and unstable in sparse regions of a point cloud or when using low-resolution LiDAR. To address this issue, this paper introduces a self-supervised framework that learns an explicit symbolic representation of local geometry and uses it to improve LiDAR SLAM recursively. Specifically, each point is represented as a Gaussian distribution, allowing local geometry to be described by a covariance. Without dense geometry labels or ground-truth poses, the framework learns by maximizing the likelihood of local geometry, with self-supervision derived from consistency relations over symbolic geometric representations, including predicted covariances, correspondences, and trajectory from SLAM. The learned geometry is then fed back into LiDAR SLAM, forming a reciprocal loop in which improved geometry enhances localization and mapping, and improved localization provides cleaner supervision for subsequent geometry reasoning. This framework is backend-agnostic and can be plugged into existing LiDAR SLAM pipelines without architectural changes. Experiments on KITTI under varying LiDAR resolutions show that the proposed method improves both odometry and global registration.

</details>


### [453] [KYON: Semi-Modular Wheel-Legged Quadruped With Agile Bimanual Capability](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30243)
*Luca Rossini,Arturo Laurenzi,Francesco Ruscelli,Yifang Zhang,Giovanbattista Gravina,Lorenzo Baccelliere,Corrado Burchielli,Stefano Cordasco,Nikos Tsagarakis*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了KYON，一种结合轮式和腿式四足机器人，配备双臂上身，适用于移动与操作任务。通过可配置腿部和特殊底座布置，实现高效灵活的运动和操作能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 近年来，移动操作机器人需要在复杂和非结构化环境中执行多样化任务，因此同时支持高效移动与精密操作的机器人平台需求增加。现有系统多难兼顾灵活移动与高效操作，促使作者研发新型平台。

Method: KYON机器人采用半模块化设计，其下肢可根据环境在轮式和腿式模式间切换。驱动器安装于底座，并通过传动机构减小远端惯量，提升动态性能。系统整合了全身控制框架及强化学习策略，可分别应对复杂动力学并增强抗扰动能力，实现灵活移动和双手操作。

Result: 实验结果表明，KYON能高效完成动态移动和双臂操作任务，凸显了其在复杂和非结构化环境下的有效性。

Conclusion: KYON实现了高性能的移动和操作一体化，具备较强的适应复杂场景和抗扰动能力，为移动操作机器人平台提供了新方向。

Abstract: This paper presents KYON, a hybrid wheel-legged quadruped robot equipped with a bimanual upper body for loco-manipulation tasks. The platform features a semi-modular design with a reconfigurable lower legs, enabling both wheeled and legged locomotion depending on the environment. A design approach that places actuators in the base and uses transmission mechanisms reduces distal inertia, improving agility and dynamic performance. The robot integrates a whole-body control framework together with a reinforcement learning based policy to handle nonlinear dynamics and enhance robustness to disturbances for the execution of locomotion and manipulation tasks, independently. Experimental results demonstrate effective dynamic locomotion and bimanual manipulation, validating the platform's capability to operate in complex and unstructured scenarios.

</details>


### [454] [ConCent: Contact-Centric Real-to-Sim-to-Real Learning from One Demonstration](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30268)
*Heecheol Kim,Namiko Saito,Katsushi Ikeuchi,Yasuyuki Matsushita*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种以接触为中心的仿真到现实(RL)策略迁移框架，通过利用现实演示中提取的任务相关接触事件序列作为学习目标，提高了操作任务中策略从模拟到现实的迁移稳定性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的sim-to-real策略迁移在接触丰富的操作任务中效果不佳，主要受限于仿真和现实中接触动力学的不一致，微小差别可能导致任务完全失败。因此，研究如何提升仿真与现实中接触的高度一致性，是实现高效策略迁移的关键。

Method: 作者提出以接触事件为核心的强化学习框架：1）自动从现实演示中提取任务相关的接触事件序列；2）将物体近似为基本几何体，优化其在仿真中的接触几何，使本地接触动力学符合实际状态转移；3）用该结构化的接触事件序列作为奖励信号，引导RL学习物理合理、能在现实中表现良好的策略，且无需人工设计奖励。

Result: 在多个接触丰富的机器人操作任务上，本文方法与无约束RL基线相比，策略迁移到现实展现出更好的稳定性和鲁棒性。

Conclusion: 将接触事件序列作为强化学习奖励，可以有效提升仿真到现实的策略迁移质量，有助于推广仿真训练在机器人实际操作任务中的应用。

Abstract: Sim-to-real policy transfer -- deploying policies trained in simulation in the real world -- is a promising paradigm for scaling robot manipulation without large-scale real-world data. However, transferring simulation-trained policies remains challenging due to discrepancies in contact dynamics -- particularly in contact-rich tasks where subtle differences can alter task outcomes entirely. Because interaction between the manipulated object and the environment is mediated through contact, task success depends on accurately reproducing task-relevant contacts. Accordingly, in manipulation, contact-centric fidelity -- reproducing both the contact event sequence (when, where, and how contacts occur) and the local contact dynamics (how forces and motions evolve at each contact) -- is a necessary condition for task success. Based on this insight, we propose a contact-centric real-to-sim-to-real RL framework that uses task-relevant contact event sequences extracted from real demonstrations as the learning objective. We approximate objects as groups of primitives and optimize their contact geometry in simulation so that the resulting local contact dynamics explain the observed state transitions. The contact event sequence is automatically extracted by replaying the demonstration. This sequence serves as a structured reward signal, guiding the policy toward physically plausible contact regimes validated in reality and preventing exploitation of unrealistic simulator contacts. The signal is obtained automatically, requiring no per-task reward design. Experiments on contact-rich manipulation tasks demonstrate more stable and robust sim-to-real policy transfer compared to unconstrained RL baselines.

</details>


### [455] [ActiveVital: Geometry-Aware Embodied Vital Signs Monitoring for Home Healthcare Robots](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30275)
*Yuxuan Hu,Shihao Li,Yang Xiao,Gen Li,Feng Xu,Jianfei Yang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出ActiveVital系统，实现了基于视觉引导的mmWave雷达主动呼吸和心率监测，显著提升了家庭机器人在非接触、自主场景下的生命体征检测准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 家庭机器人要实现长期陪伴和安全监测，需稳定获取用户呼吸和心率。但mmWave雷达只能感知径向运动，任意机器人和人体的空间关系导致检测结果波动，难以实现鲁棒、无接触的体征监测。

Method: 将传统‘被动接收'信号模式转为‘主动调节几何'模式。提出ActiveVital框架，先用视觉关键点定位胸部，通过控制算法引导机器人调整位置和朝向，使雷达到达最佳探测角度。同时，差分相位增强模块改进信号提取过程，提升对微动的检测能力。

Result: 实验结果表明，ActiveVital系统将呼吸区间误差由0.87秒降至0.14秒，心率误差由13.59次/分降至2.22次/分。该系统在任意机器人-人空间关系下均能稳定高精度输出信号，与受控静态实验的表现相当。

Conclusion: 主动几何调控结合视觉辅助显著提升了移动机器人mmWave无接触体征检测的准确性和鲁棒性，为家庭场景下长时生命体征监测提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Home robots require reliable vital signs monitoring to support long-term companionship and safety in daily environments, yet obtaining respiration and heart rate without physical contact remains challenging in unconstrained home settings. Millimeter-wave (mmWave) radar offers a promising solution due to its phase sensitivity to sub-millimeter motions. However, mmWave measurements are fundamentally constrained by observation geometry, since only the radial component of motion is observable. Consequently, arbitrary robot-human orientations often introduce angular misalignment that destabilizes vital signs estimation. To address this limitation, we reformulate vital signs monitoring from passive signal recovery to active geometric regulation. We propose ActiveVital, a vision-guided sensing framework that treats sensing geometry as an explicit control variable for robots. It localizes the chest anchor via visual keypoints and converts alignment errors into control commands. This steers the robot-mounted radar toward near-normal incidence to the thoracic surface, maximizing radial observability within a perception-action loop. A differential phase enhancement module further stabilizes signal extraction under motion. Experiments show that ActiveVital reduces respiration interval error from 0.87 s to 0.14 s and heart rate error from 13.59 bpm to 2.22 bpm, achieving accuracy comparable to controlled static sensing while remaining robust under unconstrained robot-human configurations.

</details>


### [456] [X-Morph: Human Motion Priors for Scalable Robot Learning Across Morphologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30290)
*Ritwik Sharma,Shivam Sood,Arhaan Jain,Shyam Charan Kesavamoorthi,Chengyang He,Guillaume Sartoretti*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了X-Morph方法，将人类动作转化为多种非人形腿式机器人的运动和操作策略，实现了动作迁移与泛化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 非人形腿式机器人（如四足、六足及带机械臂的四足机器人）的运动数据稀缺，难以直接借鉴现有的人类运动数据。如何高效利用人类动作数据来丰富和提升这一类机器人的行为能力，成为一大挑战。

Method: 提出了X-Morph管线，包括：1）跨形态重定向阶段，将人类动作转化为符合机器人运动学、能保持动作意图的参考轨迹；2）采用特权强化学习策略追踪参考轨迹，并通过策略蒸馏生成可部署的学生策略。

Result: 在三种不同形态的机器人（四足、六足、带机械臂的四足）上进行了评估，策略能追踪多样化的人类动作，并泛化到未见过的新动作，满足远程操控、行为先验控制和文本驱动的运动生成等多种场景需求。

Conclusion: X-Morph表明，大规模人类动作数据可为非人形机器人学习广泛、可复用的行为先验提供基础，促进机器人行为智能的发展。

Abstract: Recent progress in humanoid behavior models has been driven in large part by abundant human motion data, but comparable motion data is scarce for non-humanoid legged robots such as quadrupeds, hexapods, and quadruped manipulators. A promising alternative is to repurpose human motion across embodiments; however, direct retargeting often produces motions that are visually plausible yet physically inconsistent or difficult to track under robot dynamics. We present X-Morph, a human-motion-to-robot-behavior pipeline that converts human motion into deployable locomotion and loco-manipulation policies for diverse non-humanoid legged morphologies. A cross-morphology retargeting stage converts human motions into kinematically plausible, intent-preserving robot references, which are then tracked by a privileged RL policy and distilled into a causal student policy. We evaluate X-Morph on three morphologically distinct platforms: a quadruped, a hexapod, and a quadruped equipped with a manipulator. The resulting policies track diverse retargeted motions, generalize to unseen human motions, and support downstream use cases including video-based teleoperation, behavior-prior control, and text-conditioned motion generation. These results suggest that large-scale human motion can serve as a substrate for learning broad, reusable behavior priors beyond humanoid robots. Project page: https://maker-rat.github.io/morph/

</details>


### [457] [CSAR: Containerized System Architecture for Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30293)
*Ambrosio-Cestero,Gregorio,Galindo Andrades,Cipriano,Gonzalez-Jimenez,Javier,Ruiz-Sarmiento,Jose-Raul*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了CSAR，一个专为机器人分布式计算体系开发的容器化架构，解决多用户跨环境部署与资源共享等挑战，并通过实验证实其有效性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人应用日益依赖分布式计算（嵌入式设备、边缘、云），以及团队协作的复杂性提升，现有开发与部署机制难以应对依赖隔离、兼容性、复现性和高效资源共享等实际问题。

Method: CSAR采用以LXC/LXD为基础的系统容器，结合ROS 2/DDS通信协议，设计三层边缘基础设施架构，通过系统核心、平台与多用户编排、计算与加速三大层，有效实现硬件关联的持久运行环境和强隔离性，实现拓扑感知的网络与资源调配。

Result: CSAR在学术机器人实验室真实部署，并在3D SLAM边缘卸载和GPU加速语义建图等场景下测试。结果表明CSAR简化了软件集成，提高了共享资源的利用率，同时保障安全原型开发与实验复现性。

Conclusion: CSAR使多用户机器人团队在分布式异构环境下的软件开发、集成、部署和实验变得更加高效、可控与可复现，对实际团队协作和异构资源利用有显著促进作用。

Abstract: Robotic applications increasingly rely on distributed computational infrastructures that combine embedded devices, edge servers, and cloud resources. This evolution, together with the collaborative nature of robotics projects, has made the development, integration, deployment, and long-term operation of robotic systems significantly more complex. In practice, multi-user robotics software teams face persistent challenges related to dependency isolation, compatibility, reproducibility, efficient sharing of specialized hardware, and deployment across heterogeneous environments. In this paper, we present CSAR (Containerized System Architecture for Robotics), a container-centric architectural framework designed specifically for robotics teams and the edge-cloud continuum. CSAR combines LXC/LXD-based system containerization, ROS 2/DDS-based communication, and a three-layer edge infrastructure to organize computation into hardware-affine, persistent execution environments that remain decoupled from the volatility of experimental workloads. Through its Infrastructure Core, Platform and Multi-User Orchestration, and Compute and Acceleration layers, CSAR provides strong isolation, controlled resource sharing, and topology-aware networking for distributed robotic applications. To demonstrate its validity, we describe a real deployment of CSAR in an academic robotics laboratory and evaluate it through representative use cases involving edge-offloaded 3D SLAM and GPU-accelerated semantic mapping. The results indicate that CSAR simplifies software integration, improves the utilization of shared computational resources, and facilitates safe prototyping, as well as reproducible and collaborative experimentation in robotics teams. The implementation described in this paper, including deployment templates, configuration files, and documentation, is available at https://github.com/goyoambrosio/CSAR.

</details>


### [458] [Chronos: A Physics-Informed Full-History Framework for Non-Markovian Long-Horizon Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30318)
*Yulin Zhou,Yimeng Wang,Nengyu Wang,Shaojia Xing,Shiyun Tu,Xiang Li,Jingkai Zhang,Ningbo Jiang,Yuankai Lin,Hua Yang,Xiangrui Zeng,Zhouping Yin*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种名为Chronos的面向非马尔可夫长时操作的物理启发型全历史机器人控制框架，利用历史观测序列构成策略隐状态，使机器人在需要记忆的操作任务中表现出色。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 许多现有通用机器人策略（如VLA和模仿生成方法）依赖于当前观测或短历史窗口，忽略了完整的操作历史。这种马尔可夫假设在需要记忆的操作任务中存在局限性，相同观测下实际应采取的动作可能因历史不同而不同。作者针对这一难题，提出了一种能够有效利用完整历史的新方法。

Method: Chronos框架将所有历史观测信息从辅助上下文提升为策略动态的隐状态。具体做法是在每个物理控制步，将观测与自身体感融合生成代表状态的token，与物理时间一一对应。通过选择性的状态空间模型传递历史隐状态，并用IMLE方法生成粗粒度动作先验，之后用基于薛定谔桥思想的二阶加速度场进一步优化动作生成，提升机器人运动的平滑性与物理合理性。

Result: Chronos在16个仿真任务和4个真实场景测试中，尤其是在需要记忆任务阶段的RMBench上取得显著提升。如平均成功率达73.6%，较马尔可夫型VLA基线提升62.4个百分点（相对提升6.6倍），且参数量减少10倍。相比具备记忆的Mem-0基线，Chronos提升22.8个百分点，参数量减少逾30倍。实际双臂实验中也取得了明显超越。

Conclusion: 实验结果表明，机器人操作策略的历史信息不应仅作为辅助上下文处理，而应内化为策略动态的核心隐状态。这一思路可显著提升机器人在长时记忆需求下的操控表现，并提高效率与泛化能力。

Abstract: General-purpose robot policies should be modeled as dynamical systems, yet many VLA and generative imitation policies still rely on present observations or short windows. This Markovian shortcut fails in memory-dependent manipulation: identical observations can demand different actions after different histories. We present Chronos, a physics-informed full-history framework for non-Markovian long-horizon manipulation. The key idea is to elevate observation history from auxiliary context to the latent state of the policy dynamics. At each physical control step, Chronos forms one state-representative token by fusing observation and proprioception, so the token sequence is aligned one-to-one with physical time. A selective state space model propagates this causal historical state, which conditions a multimodal coarse action prior through implicit maximum likelihood estimation (IMLE). This prior is then refined by a second-order Schrodinger-inspired bridge that predicts acceleration fields, yielding smoother and more physically grounded robot motion. Across 16 simulated tasks and 4 real-world experiments, Chronos is evaluated on precision insertion, general manipulation, and memory-dependent long-horizon control. On RMBench, where success requires remembering task phase, Chronos achieves 73.6% average success, outperforming Markovian VLA baseline pi0.5 by +62.4 percentage points, a 6.6x relative gain, while using 10x fewer parameters. It also surpasses the memory VLA Mem-0 by 22.8 points while using over 30x fewer parameters. In real-world dual-arm experiments using a single RGB camera, Chronos achieves 78% average success over four tasks, including 72% on the three memory-dependent tasks, whereas pi0.5 achieves 7% overall and 0% on the memory-dependent subset. These results suggest that history should not be treated as auxiliary context, but as the latent state of the manipulation policy.

</details>


### [459] [ReactiveBFM: Reactive Closed-Loop Motion Planning Towards Universal Humanoid Whole-Body Control](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30362)
*Xiao Chen,Weishuai Zeng,Xiaojie Niu,Zirui Wang,Jianan Li,Huayi Wang,Furui Xu,Jiahe Chen,Weixiang Zhong,Lihe Ding,Kailin Li,Jiangmiao Pang,Tai Wang,Tianfan Xue,Jingbo Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了ReactiveBFM，一种实时闭环规划-控制框架，实现了具备高度整体协调和反应能力的人形机器人运动，显著优于传统方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前的行为基础模型（BFMs）只能执行预定义的参考动作，难以应对环境变化，缺乏全身反应和协调能力，且与生成式运动规划简单级联容易产生累计跟踪误差，导致表现不佳。

Method: ReactiveBFM引入了定序前缀采样课程，通过让生成式规划器在不完美状态下主动学习误差恢复行为，减少暴露偏差。同时，采用异步重规划和轨迹分段机制，解决规划与高频跟踪间的延迟问题，实现流畅、无抖动的动作执行。

Result: ReactiveBFM在Unitree G1人形机器人上实现了前所未有的运动敏捷性，可以零样本完成动态目标追踪，展现了复杂的全身协调和即时重规划能力。在面对严重扰动的仿真测试中，成功率达93.1%，比传统级联方法高出28.6%。

Conclusion: ReactiveBFM显著提升了人形机器人运动的适应性和鲁棒性，为实现高度智能化和自主反应的人形机器人控制奠定了基础。

Abstract: While current Behavior Foundation Models (BFMs) provide robust control priors for humanoids, they only execute pre-defined reference motions. As a result, they are vulnerable to environmental shifts and incapable of reactive whole-body coordination. Naively cascading them with generative motion planners fails to achieve true reactivity, as inevitable tracking discrepancies induce fatal cumulative exposure bias. To bridge this gap, we propose ReactiveBFM, a real-time closed-loop planning-control framework. At its core, we effectively mitigate exposure bias via a scheduled prefix sampling curriculum, forcing the generative planner to actively learn error-recovery behaviors from imperfect physical states rather than ground-truth trajectories. Systematically, to reconcile the severe latency mismatch between auto-regressive planning and high-frequency tracking, we introduce an asynchronous replanning mechanism. Combined with trajectory chunking to temporally ensemble spatial references, our system guarantees spatio-temporally fluid execution without physical jitter. Deployed on the Unitree G1 humanoid, ReactiveBFM demonstrates unprecedented physical agility across a vast repertoire of text-conditioned closed-loop motions. Notably, ReactiveBFM achieves zero-shot moving target reaching, showcasing intricate whole-body coordination and on-the-fly replanning. In sim-to-sim benchmarking under severe perturbations, ReactiveBFM achieves a 93.1% success rate, significantly outperforming cascaded open-loop baselines by 28.6%.

</details>


### [460] [FutureNav: Unified World-Action Modeling for Vision-and-Language Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30367)
*Lingfeng Zhang,Zeying Gong,Xiaoshuai Hao,Haoxiang Fu,Qiang Zhang,Mingliang Zhou,Hangjun Ye,Xiaojun Liang,Junwei Liang,Wenbo Ding*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: FutureNav提出了一种将世界状态建模与动作预测统一的框架，显著提升了视觉-语言导航（VLN）任务的性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉-语言导航（VLN）方法大多直接将指令映射为动作，缺乏对环境世界状态的显式建模和未来状态预测，这限制了模型的空间理解和泛化能力。

Method: FutureNav基于视觉-语言模型（VLM），将文本、视觉和空间特征共同编码，并输入大语言模型（LLM），同时优化四个目标：导航动作预测（policy）、逆向和顺向动力学建模（state transitions）、以及未来空间状态生成（future spatial state prediction），实现对世界状态和动作的统一建模。

Result: 在使用仅40亿参数骨干网络的情况下，FutureNav在多个VLN基准上获得了最新最优性能，显著超越了现有方法。

Conclusion: FutureNav通过统一建模世界状态与动作，为VLN的世界-动作模型发展铺平了道路，提升了推断效率和泛化能力，未来会开源以促进相关研究。

Abstract: Vision-and-language navigation (VLN) in continuous environments requires an agent to ground instructions in egocentric observations while maintaining spatial understanding across long action sequences. Recent navigation foundation models have shown strong progress by scaling vision-language models, but they often learn navigation primarily as direct action generation, without explicitly modeling world states or predicting their future evolution. We introduce FutureNav, a VLM-based unified world-action modeling framework for vision-and-language navigation. Specifically, FutureNav jointly encodes text, visual, and spatial features and feeds them into the LLM, and optimizes four objectives for simultaneous world and action modeling: an action policy objective for navigation action prediction, inverse and forward dynamics objectives for modeling state transitions, and a future generation objective for predicting future spatial states. This unified architecture strengthens action prediction while explicitly modeling the world, without sacrificing inference speed. Extensive experiments show that, with only a 4B-scale backbone, FutureNav achieves state-of-the-art performance on multiple VLN benchmarks and substantially outperforms prior VLN methods, paving the way toward future world-action models for VLN. We will release the code and models to support future research.

</details>


### [461] [HUMEMBR: Learning Human Routines for Predictive Embodied Navigation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30404)
*Samira Huber,Klaas Pelzer,Duc M. Nguyen,Xuesu Xiao,Sören Pirk*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种用于服务机器人的人类中心记忆系统（HUMEMBR），能够理解和推理人的行为习惯，并应用于实际环境中的问答与导航任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在实际场景中，机器人需长期理解和预测人类行为（如定位特定个体、预测其去向和活动时间），但长时记忆和行为模式建模是难点。

Method: 提出HUMEMBR系统，结合了持续的记忆构建流程和并行检索、查询机制，能够积累人类习惯的结构化表示，并支持交互式用户查询。

Result: 实验表明，HUMEMBR在推理人类长期行为方面优于同类LLM基线方法，且所用token更少。系统还成功部署在物理机器人上，能在不同真实环境中处理多样化的查询及导航任务。

Conclusion: HUMEMBR系统能够高效持久地记忆和推理人类行为规律，提升了机器人在实际人类环境中的问答和导航能力，为长期人类-机器人共存提供了有力工具。

Abstract: Understanding and navigating human-centered environments over extended periods of time while considering human behavior and routines remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. In real-world settings, robots may be asked to locate a specific individual, predict where that person is likely to be, or estimate when they typically leave a building. Addressing such queries requires reasoning over extensive histories of observations and capturing long-term behavioral patterns. To this end, we introduce Human-Centered Memory for Embodied Robots (HUMEMBR), a system designed for embodied question answering and routine-conditioned navigation. HUMEMBR integrates a continuous memory construction process with a parallel retrieval and querying mechanism, enabling the system to accumulate structured representations of human routines while supporting interactive, user-driven queries. Our experimental results indicate that HUMEMBR improves long-horizon reasoning about human behavior relative to full-context LLM baselines, while using substantially fewer tokens. Furthermore, we deploy HUMEMBR on a physical robot in two distinct environments, showing its ability to handle diverse queries and navigation tasks under real-world conditions.

</details>


### [462] [Vision-Language-Action Models: Experimental Insights from a Real-World UR5 Platform](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30456)
*Mathilde Hochedel,Marc Lalonde*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本项目验证了Vision-Language-Action（VLA）模型是否能从受控环境迁移到实际机器人平台，并提出了可复现的系统级评估框架，揭示了模型实际部署面临的系统级挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管VLA模型在基准测试中表现优异，但其在实际机器人操作中的效果尚未明确，因此需要研究如何将其从研究环境迁移至真实场景。

Method: 项目结合了UR5e机械臂的真实机器人数据采集、RLDS数据集格式工程、OpenVLA及OpenVLA-OFT模型的微调与部署，并系统验证了动作表示与控制接口的有效性。

Result: 构建了数据采集与转换流程、VLA模型的训练与推断基础设施，在真实机器人实验中，发现离线指标与实际闭环行为存在明显落差，主要受系统整体流程、动作语义、坐标系、一致性预处理和数据质量影响。

Conclusion: VLA模型的实际部署瓶颈不在于模型能力，而在于对全流程数据-模型-控制系统的严密把控。机器人任务的鲁棒执行是系统级难题，需要精准规范各环节、保证流程一致性，以实现稳定部署。

Abstract: This project investigates whether recent Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models can be transferred from controlled research benchmarks to a real-world robotic platform, specifically a UR5e manipulator, in a reproducible and operationally meaningful manner. The work integrates real-robot data acquisition, dataset engineering (compatible with the RLDS format), and the fine-tuning and deployment of OpenVLA and OpenVLA-OFT models, with systematic validation of action representations and control interfaces. The project resulted in several foundational assets: (i) a complete real-robot data acquisition pipeline, (ii) a dataset conversion workflow aligned with RLDS standards, (iii) an initial fine-tuning and inference infrastructure for VLA models, and (iv) a structured set of experimental observations grounded in real-robot trials. These elements collectively establish a reproducible framework for evaluating learning-based manipulation systems beyond simulation. Empirically, the experiments reveal a consistent gap between promising offline indicators and unstable closed-loop behavior on the physical system: this gap cannot be attributed solely to model limitations, it is strongly influenced by action semantics, coordinate frame conventions, temporal alignment between modalities, image preprocessing consistency, and dataset coverage and quality. These observations lead to a key interpretation: the successful deployment of VLA systems in real-world settings depends less on incremental improvements in model capacity and more on precise control of the entire data-model-control pipeline. The project reframes VLA-based robotics from a primarily model-centric challenge to a system-level problem; it highlights the difficulty of running robust task execution on the real robot and provides a clear, experimentally grounded understanding of the conditions required for reliable deployment.

</details>


### [463] [Behavior Prompting Policy: Demonstrations as Prompts for Manipulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30457)
*Austin Patel,Ben Pekarek,Joel Enrique Castro Hernandez,Shuran Song*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出行为提示（behavior prompting）范式，实现机器人通过单次人类演示即可在推理阶段完成新任务；提出了新架构、数据采集方法及评测基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 目前机器人要学习新任务通常需要大量数据和昂贵的微调，缺乏高效与通用的少样本泛化方式。作者希望让机器人能像大型语言模型那样通过“提示”来快速适应新任务。

Method: 1) 提出行为提示策略（Behavior Prompting Policy, BPP）——能用当前观测与单次人类演示输入（行为提示）生成动作的视觉-运动模型；2) 提出iPhUMI手持操作界面，用于高效采集多样化训练数据；3) 构建DrawAnything与LIBERO-Gen基准，用于测试模型在新画图和桌面操作任务上的适应能力。

Result: BPP架构能通过一次行为提示有效泛化并完成新的任务。iPhUMI不仅用于高效训练数据采集，也可作为测试时为机器人下达新任务的实用接口。

Conclusion: 行为提示为机器人提供了通用、灵活且可扩展的能力学习方式，显著降低对大规模微调的需求，并提升机器人在现实复杂环境中的适用性。

Abstract: We study behavior prompting, a paradigm that enables robots to perform new tasks at inference time given a single human demonstration, which we call a behavior prompt. To enable this capability, we present contributions in algorithm, data, and evaluation. For algorithm, we introduce Behavior Prompting Policy (BPP), an in-context visuomotor architecture that translates the behavior prompt and the current observation into robot actions. For data, we identify that task diversity is the primary driver of the prompting capability and introduce iPhUMI, a handheld manipulation interface for collecting diverse training data. For evaluation, we introduce DrawAnything and LIBERO-Gen to evaluate test-time adaptation to unseen drawing and tabletop manipulation tasks. We also demonstrate that iPhUMI serves as a practical interface for specifying behavior prompts at test time, enabling a human to command a robot via a single demonstration to complete known tasks or to define new robot capabilities. Altogether, behavior prompting provides a flexible and scalable way to teach robots new skills without the need for expensive fine-tuning. Our project website is located at https://behavior-prompting.github.io/ .

</details>


### [464] [Grasp-Oriented Non-Prehensile Manipulation via Learning a Graspability Field](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30474)
*Licheng Zhong,Gim Hee Lee*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种新的非抓取操作（Non-prehensile manipulation）方法，通过优化物体抓取可达性而不是预设目标姿态，使机器人实现自适应的对象重构并可靠完成抓取任务。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有非抓取操作方法往往要求事先设定目标物体的姿态，但现实中，物体通常有多种可抓取状态，且目标姿态事先未知。因而需要研究如何在无需预设目标姿态的情况下，将物体调整到可以抓取的位置和状态。

Method: 作者提出基于对象的抓取可达性优化方法，将非抓取操作问题转化为最大化可抓取集合的抓取可达性场。通过合成多种抓取动作，定义抓取可达性场，对物体配置的可抓取性进行度量。以此为基础，该指标为强化学习提供了稠密的学习信号，并作为操作终止判断依据，实现一个端到端、闭环的操作-到-抓取策略，无须外部规划或手动停止条件。

Result: 在仿真和真实机器人实验中，该方法的策略能稳定地将物体调整到可抓取状态，并无需外部规划或人工设定停止条件即可顺利转入抓取。预测的抓取可达性距离与真实世界中的抓取成功率高度相关，表明所学到的表示能有效反映物体可抓取配置的实际可行性。

Conclusion: 该工作提出了一种无需预设目标姿态、直接优化物体可抓取性的非抓取操作方法，并通过端到端闭环策略在实际和模拟环境中验证了其有效性和通用性。

Abstract: Non-prehensile manipulation is often used as a preparatory step for robotic grasping, yet existing approaches typically require a predefined target object pose. In practice, however, objects admit multiple graspable configurations and the desired pose is not known in advance. We reformulate non-prehensile manipulation for grasping as optimizing an object centric graspability objective rather than reaching a specific pose. We construct a graspable set from synthesized grasps and define a graspability field that measures how suitable an object configuration is for successful grasp execution. The scalar measure provides a dense learning signal for reinforcement learning and determines when to terminate manipulation. This yields a closed-loop manipulation-to-grasp pipeline driven by a single policy. Experiments in simulation and on a real robot show that the policy reliably reconfigures objects into graspable states and transitions to grasping without external planners or manually specified stopping conditions. The predicted graspability distance correlates with real world grasp success, which indicates that the learned representation captures grasp feasibility of object configurations.

</details>


### [465] [Learning from Mistakes: Rollout-Retrieval Lifelong Policy Learning for Autonomous Driving](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30537)
*Cheng Gong,Haoyang Wang,Chao Lu,Zirui Li,Jianwei Gong*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种用于自动驾驶策略持续改进的新方法R^2LPL，可通过不断积累自身可纠正的错误经验来提升性能，并在现有基准测试中获得了最优表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有自动驾驶策略多数依赖专家示范并期望模型能泛化应对复杂情况，缺乏显式机制来纠正和记忆实际部署中暴露的错误。因此需要一种能在实际运作中不断完善自身能力的方法，使策略能够持续提升并保有既有技能。

Method: 作者提出Rollout-Retrieval Lifelong Policy Learning（R^2LPL）框架。该方法通过回放策略执行过程中产生的可恢复错误状态并检索合适的改进目标，将错误实例转化为用于监督学习的知识，进而高效提升策略性能，并通过持续学习机制保存既有知识避免遗忘。

Result: R^2LPL在大规模nuPlan自动驾驶基准上进行评测，仅需少量回放与持续学习周期，就能使初始表现一般的策略显著提升至当前最优水平，特别是在最具挑战性的长尾测试集Test14-hard上效果突出。

Conclusion: R^2LPL能够有效将策略运行中可恢复的错误转化为可用的纠正知识，从而实现持久且高效的自动驾驶策略改进，表现出持续学习和性能跃升的潜力。

Abstract: Autonomous driving policies should be able to improve continually as deployment exposes them to increasingly diverse and long-tail traffic situations. However, most learning-based policies are trained or fine-tuned on expert demonstrations and then rely largely on generalization to handle challenging closed-loop scenarios, lacking an explicit mechanism to correct and retain the mistakes exposed in these scenarios. This paper studies autonomous driving policy improvement from a lifelong learning perspective: Can a pretrained policy improve continually by accumulating corrective knowledge derived from its own mistakes, while retaining previously acquired driving competence? To answer this question, we propose Rollout-Retrieval Lifelong Policy Learning (R$^2$LPL), a policy learning framework that retrieves corrective targets from recoverable policy-induced mistakes and retains the resulting knowledge through lifelong policy learning. R^2LPL addresses a key bottleneck in continual policy improvement: closed-loop mistakes reveal where the policy is weak, but do not directly specify what the policy should learn. By filtering recoverable mistake-related states and retrieving feasible corrective targets, R$^2$LPL turns sparse failure evidence into compact supervised knowledge for stable and sample-efficient policy improvement. We evaluate R$^2$LPL on large-scale closed-loop nuPlan benchmarks. With only a few rollout and continual-learning cycles, R$^2$LPL elevates a learning-based planner with moderate initial performance to state-of-the-art performance across the evaluated benchmarks, especially on the challenging and long-tail Test14-hard split. These results demonstrate the effectiveness of R$^2$LPL in converting recoverable closed-loop mistakes into corrective knowledge for sustained policy improvement.

</details>


### [466] [Training Vision-Language-Action Models with Dense Embodied Chain-of-Thought Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30552)
*Haoyang Li,Guanlin Li,Youhe Feng,Chen Zhao,Zhuoran Wang,Yang Li,Qizhe Wei,Shifeng Bao,Haitao Shen,Yihan Zhao,Tong Yang,Jing Zhang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: ZR-0是一种大规模端到端视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型，通过引入具身链式思维（ECoT）监督，实现不同机器人平台间的高效泛化和迁移。该模型在多种仿真和实际机器人上展现出优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的VLA模型在不同机器人平台之间迁移存在挑战，主要因为各平台在低层状态和动作空间存在根本性差异。然而，高层的认知过程（如场景感知、任务规划等）在不同平台间较为通用。作者正是基于这一点，提出了统一高层认知建模以突破跨平台迁移障碍。

Method: 提出ZR-0模型，采用2.6B参数的双流架构，包括一个预训练的视觉-语言模型（生成ECoT推理）和一个Diffusion Transformer动作专家（产生连续动作片段），两者通过交叉注意力机制耦合。训练使用规模庞大的60M帧ECoT密集标注数据集。推理时可跳过推理流（System 2），不影响性能。

Result: ZR-0在三个仿真基准（单臂、双臂、类人）及真实xArm平台上均表现出色，证实了其跨具身迁移能力和广泛适用性。

Conclusion: 通过高层认知ECoT监督和双流结构，ZR-0突破了VLA模型跨平台迁移瓶颈，为通用机器人智能发展打下坚实基础。

Abstract: Cross-embodiment transfer in vision-language-action (VLA) models remains challenging because low-level state and action spaces differ fundamentally across robot platforms. We observe that the high-level cognitive process underlying manipulation, including scene perception, object identification, task planning, and sub-task decomposition, is largely shared across embodiments. Based on this observation, we present ZR-0, a 2.6 billion parameter end-to-end VLA model that uses dense Embodied Chain-of-Thought (ECoT) supervision to align cross-embodiment representations within the vision-language model (VLM). ZR-0 adopts a dual-stream architecture: a pre-trained VLM (System 2) generates structured ECoT reasoning during training, while a Diffusion Transformer-based action expert (System 1) produces continuous action chunks via flow matching. The two components are coupled through cross-attention, with an attention mask that restricts the action expert to input prompt features only, enabling ECoT generation to be entirely skipped at inference without any performance loss. ZR-0 is pre-trained on ProcCorpus-60M, a large-scale dataset comprising approximately 60 million frames (approximately 1,000 hours) from over 400K trajectories, with dense ECoT annotations covering 96.8% of all frames. We evaluate ZR-0 on three simulation benchmarks spanning single-arm (LIBERO), bimanual (RoboTwin 2.0), and humanoid (RoboCasa GR-1 Tabletop) embodiments, as well as real-world experiments on the xArm platform, demonstrating strong performance across all settings. Code and model checkpoints are available at https://github.com/RUCKBReasoning/ZR-0.

</details>


### [467] [MOAR Planner: Multi-Objective and Adaptive Risk-Aware Path Planning for Infrastructure Inspection with a UAV](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30575)
*Louis Petit,Alexis Lussier Desbiens*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出MOAR路径规划器，通过风险感知成本函数，结合实时轨迹调整，实现UAV在复杂和高风险环境中的自主导航，并在仿真和实飞测试中展现优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在无人机(UAV)巡检任务中，复杂环境下的自主导航依然困难，需同时考虑障碍物、天气、通信、续航等动态风险，缺乏能动态感知并应对多种风险的高效路径规划方法。

Method: 提出MOAR路径规划器，构建风险感知成本函数，融合预先计算的成本地图、新定义的损伤和插入成本以及自适应速度规划。在离散状态-动作图中搜索最优路径，实时调整轨迹以优化安全、时间与能耗。

Result: 通过仿真与实飞验证，MOAR实现了实时轨迹规划，在多个评估指标上展现广泛有效性，其性能达到流行算法评测范围的约90%。

Conclusion: MOAR框架提升了UAV在关键任务中自主性和可靠性，为动态高风险环境下的无人机自主导航提供了可靠方案。

Abstract: The problem of autonomous navigation for UAV inspection remains challenging as it requires effectively navigating in close proximity to obstacles, while accounting for dynamic risk factors such as weather conditions, communication reliability, and battery autonomy. This paper introduces the MOAR path planner which addresses the complexities of evolving risks during missions. It offers real-time trajectory adaptation while concurrently optimizing safety, time, and energy. The planner employs a risk-aware cost function that integrates pre-computed cost maps, the new concepts of damage and insertion costs, and an adaptive speed planning framework. With that, the optimal path is searched in a graph using a discrete representation of the state and action spaces. The method is evaluated through simulations and real-world flight tests. The results show the capability to generate real-time trajectories spanning a broad range of evaluation metrics: around 90% of the range occupied by popular algorithms. The proposed framework contributes by enabling UAVs to navigate more autonomously and reliably in critical missions.

</details>


### [468] [Realtime Wind Estimation using Low Cost Quadrotor Uncrewed Aerial Vehicles](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30581)
*Hiranya Udagedara,Mahdis Bisheban*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出用UKF（一种非线性估算器）代替传统的EKF，在四旋翼无人机风速估计中的实际效果更佳，特别是在非线性风况下。仿真结果显示UKF更准确、更可靠。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有利用EKF估算风速的方法，受限于EKF对无人机动力学线性化的近似，在强非线性（如大风）环境下效果有限。需要有更适用于非线性条件的风速估算方法。

Method: 将四旋翼无人机的动力学建模在SE(3)空间，采用UKF进行风速估算，并通过几何控制器确保无人机轨迹控制。用数值仿真实验对比分析UKF和EKF的表现。

Result: 仿真结果表明，随系统非线性增强，UKF在风速估计精度和轨迹保持上均明显优于EKF。

Conclusion: UKF在复杂、强非线性的风环境中比EKF更适用，能够为无人机平台提供更准确的风速估计并保持飞行轨迹稳定，具有实际应用潜力。

Abstract: In environmental monitoring as well as emergency response applications such as wildfires, wind velocity measurement is essential. Quadrotor UAVs have become popular platforms for wind velocity estimation due to their maneuverability, compact size, and cost-effectiveness. Numerous studies use the Extended Kalman Filter (EKF) to estimate the wind velocity based on the quadrotor dynamic model. However, most of them use hovering quadrotors only for wind estimation, others use a near-linear trajectory to estimate near-constant velocities. Furthermore, EKF performance is constrained by its reliance on linearized approximations of the nonlinear quadrotor dynamics around current states, limiting accuracy in highly nonlinear scenarios, including windy conditions. This study proposes the use of an Unscented Kalman Filter (UKF), a nonlinear estimator to provide accurate wind estimations while maintaining the trajectory of the quadrotor UAV. The quadrotor is modeled on the Special Euclidean group SE(3) and the approach is evaluated through numerical simulations using a geometric controller to maintain quadrotor flight paths. The results indicate that as the nonlinearity of the simulation increases, the UKF consistently outperforms the EKF. This demonstrates the potential of the UKF as a reliable estimator for highly nonlinear scenarios, capable of maintaining the trajectory with minimal deviation while providing accurate wind velocity estimations.

</details>


### [469] [Sequential Planning via Anchored Robotic Keypoints](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30613)
*Bryce Grant,Aryeh Rothenberg,Logan Senning,Zonghe Chua,Zach Patterson,Peng Wang*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: SPARK是一种无需训练的神经符号操控系统，通过锚定关键点提升机器人操作性能，在LIBERO-PRO等任务上大幅超过现有VLM和代码生成基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于大模型的多回合代码生成方法因频繁重启和感知误差在复杂任务中表现不佳，难以高效、稳定地处理不断变化的场景与需求。作者希望通过提升感知和规划的耦合效率，解决机器人灵活操作中的鲁棒性和泛化难题。

Method: SPARK系统将一次性LLM（Gemini）调用产出的行为树计划与多个低层可组合原语结合，用于规划和控制。系统主要资源用于动态感知，每个对象提供多文本提示，SAM3模型评估优选标签，并有失败恢复机制，无需每步重新调LLM。各模块解耦，可单独更换，无需重新训练。实验在三个机器人家族、九类任务进行对比测试。

Result: SPARK在LIBERO-PRO位置和任务场景中取得43.7%的成绩，显著高于CaP-Agent0（18.2%）和VLA基线。多提示和恢复机制显著提升空间与对象测试分数，并在多样机器人上验证了方案稳定性（平均68%）。

Conclusion: SPARK以训练自由、模块灵活、成绩过硬的特性，有望作为未来数据生成与机器人任务控制的高效接口，可为后续学习型策略和真实机器人部署提供坚实基础。

Abstract: We present Sequential Planning via Anchored Robotic Keypoints, SPARK, a training-free neurosymbolic manipulation system that reaches 43.7% on six LIBERO-PRO position \& task cells, more than doubling CaP-Agent0 and Vision-Language-Action (VLA) baselines. CaP-Agent0, a multi-turn code-generation agent, achieves 18.2% by re-querying an LLM at every turn, but its restart-from-scratch solution proves costly against minor policy failures. Perception is the layer that fails most under position and task changes so SPARK spends its computation there. A single Gemini call composes the plan as a typed behavior tree (BT) of composable primitives, each already containing the low-level control (motion, grasping, depth geometry) a code-generation agent would otherwise regenerate on every trial. The rest of the budget goes to perception: a second Gemini call proposes three alternative text prompts per object, SAM3 evaluates each, and we keep the prompt$\to$label pair with the most confident detection and a recovery loop then retries a failed primitive against freshly detected objects, with no new LLM call. The alternative prompts add +27.7 points on the spatial suite and +10.0 on the object suite, with the recovery loop adding +5.0 overall. SPARK runs the same primitives on three robot families (UR10e, Franka FR3, bimanual Franka) across nine unique tasks at twenty trials each, averaging 68%. Since the detector, planner, and controller modules sit behind the typed plan, they swap independently without training, and each primitive's checkable post-condition traces a failure to the corresponding module or a kinematic limit. Every trial logs a verified, labeled trajectory, so a training-free planner that already beats VLAs can supply the data those policies need without teleoperation. Project page: https://cwru-aism.github.io/spark-page/

</details>


### [470] [GROW$^2$: Grounding Which and Where for Robot Tool Use](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30632)
*Yuhong Deng,Yuyao Liu,David Hsu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本论文提出了一种新方法，使机器人能用非常规工具（如用盘子切蛋糕）解决任务，突破了工具使用的常规局限。该方法无需大量端到端训练数据，并且在开放类别对象的零样本泛化能力上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器人要实现创造性的工具使用，即利用现有物体（非专门工具）完成新任务，但这需要机器人能理解并选择合适的物体及其部位作为工具使用，这对开放世界中的赋能（affordance）推理是极大挑战。

Method: 提出GROW^2方法，将赋能定位分为语义与几何两级：首先利用视觉-语言模型（VLMs）理解自然语言任务指令，选择合适工具及其对应部位；再通过视觉基础模型根据RGB-D图像将这些部位精确定位到三维场景中。该方法避免了高成本的数据驱动训练流程。

Result: 在多项赋能预测基准测试上，GROW^2效果优于最新基线；在虚拟与实际机器人环境中，GROW^2均展示出对开放类别物体零样本泛化的强大能力，并超越现有方法。

Conclusion: GROW^2有效提升了机器人对工具创新使用的能力，实现了在无特定训练的情况下，对新类别物体及其部件的理解与精准操作，对于拓展机器人的实际应用范围具有重要意义。

Abstract: Can the robot use a plate to cut a cake if no knife is available? Tool use greatly expands robot capabilities, but to use tools creatively beyond their intended functions, the robot faces the challenge of $\textit{open-world affordance grounding}$: select an open-category object to act as a tool and localize its specific region of action. To this end, we introduce GROW$^2$ (GROunding Which and Where), which leverages object parts as a natural abstraction to split the grounding process hierarchically into semantic and geometric levels, thus bypassing the need for data-heavy, end-to-end training. Semantically, GROW$^2$ harnesses the commonsense reasoning of Vision-Language Models (VLMs) to parse a natural-language task instruction, select a suitable object as the tool, and identify task-relevant parts on the tool and the target object. Geometrically, vision foundation models then ground the selected parts into precise 3D regions from a single RGB-D image. Experiments on established benchmarks show that GROW$^2$ outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on affordance prediction benchmarks. Further, it achieves zero-shot generalization over open-category objects and outperforms baselines in both simulated and real-world robot tool use experiments.

</details>


### [471] [VLK: Learning Humanoid Loco-Manipulation from Synthetic Interactions in Reconstructed Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.30645)
*Yen-Jen Wang,Jiaman Li,Sirui Chen,Takara E. Truong,Pei Xu,Pieter Abbeel,Rocky Duan,Koushil Sreenath,Angjoo Kanazawa,Carmelo Sferrazza,Guanya Shi,Karen Liu*

Main category: cs.RO

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种合成视觉-语言-运动（VLK）监督数据的方法，通过重建场景并在其中自动合成运动轨迹，推动基于感知的人形机器人运动操控的发展，并在真实机器人验证了效果。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有数据源缺乏结合第一视角图像、语言指令与机器人运动轨迹的、可用于训练人形机器人感知-动作映射的大规模数据，限制了基于感知的运动操控研究进展。

Method: 作者采用3D高斯斑点技术重建室内环境，利用特权场景信息自动合成导航和物体交互运动轨迹，并渲染对应的第一视角图像，生成视觉-语言-运动三元组，自动化合成4.8万条轨迹用于训练。训练时采用预测短时全身运动轨迹的VLK模型，并通过全身跟踪器将预测结果转化为机器人动作。

Result: 合成数据在物理Unitree G1人形机器人上实现了基于视觉与语言指令的导航和单物体搬运，无需人工干预，展示了合成监督数据在感知-动作任务中的有效性。

Conclusion: 在重建场景中合成的视觉-语言-运动数据可为人形机器人提供高效、无人工的监督，在sim-to-real过程中有良好迁移效果，为感知驱动运动操控提供了有价值的数据基础。

Abstract: Perception-based humanoid loco-manipulation requires connecting egocentric observations and task instructions to whole-body motion. Learning this mapping requires synchronized egocentric images, language commands, and robot-compatible kinematic trajectories, yet no existing data source provides this complete tuple at scale. We address this bottleneck by generating vision-language-kinematics (VLK) supervision synthetically in reconstructed scenes. Our pipeline leverages 3D Gaussian Splatting to reconstruct metric-scale indoor environments, synthesizes navigation and object-interaction trajectories using privileged scene information, and renders paired egocentric observations after the fact. We produce 48,000 paired trajectories with no human intervention and train a VLK policy that predicts short-horizon whole-body kinematic trajectories. A whole-body tracker converts these predictions into actions on the physical humanoid. We evaluate on the physical Unitree G1 performing navigation and single-object transport, demonstrating that synthesized interactions in reconstructed scenes provide effective supervision for sim-to-real perception-based humanoid loco-manipulation. Project Website: https://vision-language-kinematics.github.io/

</details>
